zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois於1057年出生在法國維曼多斯時，他的父親Henri Ier roi des Francs49歲，母親Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France34歲。他於1077年與Adélaïde de Vermandois結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1101年被列為	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois。他去世於1101年10月18日在土耳其梅爾辛塔素斯享年44歲，埋葬在土耳其梅爾辛塔素斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois于1057年出生在法国維曼多斯时，他的父亲Henri Ier roi des Francs49岁，母亲Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France34岁。他于1077年与Adélaïde de Vermandois结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1101年被列为	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois。他去世于1101年10月18日在土耳其梅爾辛塔素斯享年44岁，埋葬在土耳其梅爾辛塔素斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Grand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, common in Scotland, where it is the name of a famous clan. It is derived from a nickname meaning ‘large’ (Anglo-Norman grand). In the United States the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the Civil War general and 18th president, Ulysses S. Grant ( 1822–85 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois was born in 1057, in Vermandois, France, his father, Henri Ier roi des Francs, was 49 and his mother, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, was 34. He married Adélaïde de Vermandois in 1077. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. In 1101, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois. He died on 18 October 1101, in Tarsus, Mersin, Türkiye, at the age of 44, and was buried in Tarsus, Mersin, Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois est né en 1057, à Vermandois, France, son père, Henri Ier roi des Francs, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Adélaïde de Vermandois en 1077. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. En 1101, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1101, à Tarsus, Mersin, Turquie, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Tarsus, Mersin, Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois 1057 in Vermandois, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri Ier roi des Francs 49 und seine Mutter Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France 34. Er hat 1077 Adélaïde de Vermandois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1101, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1101 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Tarsus, Mersin, Türkei und wurde in Tarsus, Mersin, Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois è nato il nel 1057 nel Vermandois, Francia, il suo padre, Henri Ier roi des Francs, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Adélaïde de Vermandois nel 1077. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1101, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois. Morì il 18 ottobre 1101, nel Tarsus, Mersin, Turchia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Tarsus, Mersin, Turchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandoisが1057年にフランスバーマンドイスで生まれた時，父Henri Ier roi des Francsは49歳，母Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de Franceは34歳であった。1077年にAdélaïde de Vermandoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1101年，44歳の時，職業は	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandoisと記録されている。彼は1101年10月18日にトルコメルシンターススで44歳で死去し，トルコメルシンターススにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois(이)가 1057년 프랑스 베먼도이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri Ier roi des Francs(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1077년 Adélaïde de Vermandois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1101년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois이었다. 그는 1101년 10월 18일 튀르키예 머신 터아르수스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예 머신 터아르수스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois nasceu em 1057, em Vermandois, França, seu pai, Henri Ier roi des Francs, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Adélaïde de Vermandois em 1077. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1101, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1101, em Tarsus, Mersin, Turquia, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Tarsus, Mersin, Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois родился в 1057 г. в местности вирмандоис, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri Ier roi des Francs было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Adélaïde de Vermandois в 1077 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1101 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois. Он умер 18 октября 1101 г. в местности тарсус, мирсин, Турция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности тарсус, мирсин, Турция.

sm.From 1085 to 1101: mai le 1085 e o'o I le 1101
sm.from 1101 to 1102: mai le 1101 e o'o I le 1102

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois nació en 1057, en Vermandois, Francia, su papá, Henri Ier roi des Francs, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Anna Iaroslavna of Kiev Reine de France, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Adélaïde de Vermandois en 1077. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1101, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era 	comte de vermandois, valois, et crepy; head of the french contingent in the first crusade; crusader knight in the "crusade of the faint-hearted", herre till chamont-en-vexin, 1087 greve av vermandois, greve av vermandois, count of vermandois. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1101, en Tarsus, Mersin, Turquía, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Tarsus, Mersin, Turquía.
